_comment: n8n-mcp runs locally via npx (stdio). The 7 core tools (node docs, search, validation) work with NO credentials — you can delete the N8N_API_* vars for docs-only use. The 13 management tools (create/update/run workflows, executions, credentials) require N8N_API_URL + N8N_API_KEY pointing at your n8n instance. Requires Node.js (npx). Alternative: the ghcr.io/czlonkowski/n8n-mcp Docker image.
